chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No.D- 859 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 351/2021 3. For Hearing of Main Case 07-03-2023 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G a/w Amjad Ahmed, PD, SCARP, SBA. ***** Compliance report has been filed by the Project Director, SCARP, SBA, which is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to the petitioner, who is advocate by profession. After going through the same, the petitioner expressed his satisfaction. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of by directing the Project Director, SCARP, SBA to restore the electricity and drain out the stagnant water within a period of one month under compliance report to this Court through Additional Registrar. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
